shintowiki | Overview Shrine Ranking P11250 Run History | GitHub Wiki

P11250 QuickStatements

What is this?

P11250 (Miraheze article ID) links Wikidata items to their corresponding articles on shinto.miraheze.org. Each line below adds a P11250 claim to a Wikidata item, connecting it to the shintowiki article.

These statements are generated automatically by EmmaBot and can be pasted directly into QuickStatements.

Click the text box to select all contents, then paste into QuickStatements batch mode. Each box shows up to 200 lines. Download the full file for all 0 lines.

Status

0
Pending QuickStatements

QuickStatements

0 lines — Download full p11250.txt

How it works

  1. generate_p11250_quickstatements.py walks all pages in Category:Pages linked to Wikidata
  2. For each page with {{wikidata link|Q...}}, it checks Wikidata for an existing P11250 claim
  3. If missing, a QuickStatements line is added: Q...|P11250|"shinto:Page Name"
  4. clean_p11250_quickstatements.py removes lines for items that now have the correct P11250
  5. Both scripts run daily in the GitHub Actions pipeline

Sample entries

WikidataShintowiki page
